decisions.rationale: Mentions once locked and trying again with information; fits post-lock retrial/opening question.
Directly asks whether correct information still cannot give immediate access after lock.
Asks about needing to wait a set number of hours after a lock, matching retry timing.
Focuses on locked state and whether to try again after a few hours.
Correct information is supplied but the locked account still is not opening; asks what to do.
Asks if a locked account will not open immediately and how long it takes.
After lock from wrong attempts, asks how long to wait before retrying.
Explicitly says after account lock, correct details still do not allow entry.
Asks whether waiting is enough after a lock or password reset is needed; core issue is post-lock wait.
Matches central intent: after one lock, correct details still do not open it immediately.
Explicit post-lock retry with correct information still showing locked; fits tag.
Correct information still leaves the account locked and asks how long it will take.
Correct information still produces a locked message and asks if it is time-limited.
Locked login remains inaccessible despite correct information, asking for resolution.
Asks whether immediate retry should be avoided while account is locked.
Focuses on the quoted 'Account is locked' message and generic করণীয়, without clear wait/retry framing.
Asks whether a locked account unlocks by itself after a certain time.
Asks whether it is better to try later after the lock; this is retry timing.
Asks how many hours the lock lasts while correct data still cannot log in.
Near-duplicate of row 195; same question about not retrying immediately after lock.
Asks whether lock auto-unlocks and when to log in again, matching wait/retry intent.
Correct login information still cannot enter while locked; asks how to solve.
Tried correct information on a locked account but still cannot enter; fits post-lock retrial.
Primarily asks what to do when the login shows 'অ্যাকাউন্ট লকড', colliding with locked-message support.

result.packet_rationale: Rows were kept when they clearly involved post-lock retry timing, waiting, or correct information still failing to allow login. Rows were flagged when they were primarily generic locked-message support without clear retrial/wait framing, or a near-duplicate within the packet.
